description: Run a vendor-funded fleet remediation: prove a bad population with rigorous testing, engage manufacturer for full remediation scope, require on-site vendor resources and cost ownership, and execute a time-boxed install-and-validate campaign with your support engineers.

examples.context: Data center constant errors. Deep test with manufacturer found bad memory batch. Entire fleet memory replace required.
examples.resolution: Vendor sent engineers and workers. Week-long install and test led by support eng. Cost on manufacturer. Site stabilized.

examples.context: Pressure to keep RMA drip instead of campaign.
examples.resolution: Memo blocked absorb path. Campaign authorized.

examples.context: Shop fleet of devices same error; vendor batch on a board.
examples.resolution: Batch proven; vendor funded swap wave with joint validation.
